S.FORM: Solomon Alabi hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 3, Solomon Alabi, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: s~…ēolomon alaő≤i ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, pkaki Ē kks~…ēka Ē. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, s~…ēolomon alaő≤i, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
